name: Trail Mix
instructions: Measure each ingredient separately.
Combine in a small bag or bowl.
Log final grams before eating.
Note: weigh nuts precisely — they are calorie-dense.
app_notes: Portable all-phase snack. Pumpkin seeds add zinc and magnesium for hormone support.

macro_adjustment_rules: Increase mixed nuts by 10g to add ~2g protein and ~6g fat.
Remove chocolate chips to lower carbs and fat by ~3g each.
Weigh all components separately for accurate logging.

name: Boiled Eggs & Avocado
instructions: Boil eggs for 9 minutes then cool in ice water.
Halve avocado and season.
Slice eggs and arrange alongside avocado.
Log final grams before eating.
app_notes: Choline-rich eggs and monounsaturated fats from avocado support hormone synthesis across all phases.

macro_adjustment_rules: Add one egg (~50g) to increase protein by ~6g.
Reduce avocado by 20g to lower fat by ~3g.
Add a rice cake (~10g) to introduce ~8g carbs.

name: Celery & Peanut Butter
instructions: Wash and cut celery into sticks.
Portion peanut butter.
Dip or spread celery with peanut butter.
Log final grams before eating.
app_notes: Simple light snack. Peanut butter provides magnesium — useful for PMS and luteal phase cramping.

macro_adjustment_rules: Increase peanut butter by 10g to add ~4g protein and ~8g fat.
Add an apple for ~15g more carbs.
Swap peanut butter for almond butter for a slightly different fat profile.

name: Cottage Cheese with Pineapple
instructions: Spoon cottage cheese into a bowl.
Add pineapple chunks on top.
Garnish with mint.
Log final grams before eating.
app_notes: Very light high-protein snack for follicular phase when appetite is lower. Bromelain in pineapple aids digestion.

macro_adjustment_rules: Increase cottage cheese by 50g to boost protein by ~8g.
Swap pineapple for berries to lower sugar slightly.
Add 10g walnuts to introduce ~6g fat.

name: Turkey & Cheese Roll-ups
instructions: Lay turkey slices flat on a plate.
Place cheese and spinach on each slice with a smear of mustard.
Roll each slice tightly.
Log final grams before eating.
app_notes: Excellent low-carb high-protein snack. Turkey is rich in tryptophan, which supports serotonin production in the luteal phase.

macro_adjustment_rules: Add 30g more turkey to boost protein by ~7g.
Swap cheddar for light cheese to reduce fat by ~4g.
Add cucumber strips for crunch with negligible calorie change.

name: Banana & Almond Butter
instructions: Peel and slice banana.
Portion almond butter into a small bowl.
Dip banana slices in almond butter.
Log final grams before eating.
app_notes: High-carb pre-workout or luteal phase sweet craving snack. Banana provides quick energy and potassium for muscle recovery.

macro_adjustment_rules: Use half banana (~60g) to reduce carbs by ~13g.
Increase almond butter by 10g to add ~3g protein and ~9g fat.
Swap for peanut butter for a slightly higher protein option.

name: Boiled Egg & Rye Crackers
instructions: Boil eggs 9 minutes; peel and cool.
Spread cream cheese on crackers.
Slice egg and cucumber; layer on crackers.
Log final grams before eating.
app_notes: Balanced all-phase snack with complete protein, complex carbs, and moderate fat. Meal-preppable.

macro_adjustment_rules: Add one egg to increase protein by ~6g.
Add or remove a cracker (~10g) to adjust carbs by ~7g.
Swap light cream cheese for full-fat to add ~3g fat.

name: Mango Greek Yogurt
instructions: Spoon Greek yogurt into a bowl.
Top with mango chunks.
Squeeze lime juice over the top.
Log final grams before eating.
app_notes: Very light high-protein snack for follicular phase. Mango provides vitamin C to support iron absorption and oestrogen metabolism.

macro_adjustment_rules: Increase yogurt by 50g for ~5g more protein.
Reduce mango to 40g to lower carbs by ~10g.
Add 10g honey to increase carbs by ~8g.

name: Cucumber Smoked Salmon Bites
instructions: Slice cucumber into thick rounds.
Spread cream cheese on each round.
Top with a piece of smoked salmon and a caper.
Garnish with dill and log final grams.
app_notes: Elegant low-calorie snack packed with omega-3 and iron for early cycle phases. Great for controlled appetite days.

macro_adjustment_rules: Add 20g more smoked salmon to boost protein by ~4g.
Increase cream cheese by 10g to add ~3g fat.
Swap cream cheese for avocado for different fat profile.

name: Stuffed Medjool Dates
instructions: Pit dates and open lengthways.
Fill each date with almond butter.
Arrange on a plate.
Log final grams before eating.
app_notes: Natural sugar from dates satisfies luteal sweet cravings without a blood sugar spike. Medjool dates are rich in magnesium and potassium.

macro_adjustment_rules: Remove one date (~20g) to reduce carbs by ~16g.
Increase almond butter by 10g to add ~3g protein and ~9g fat.
Swap almond butter for tahini for a different flavour profile.

name: Spiced Roasted Chickpeas
instructions: Pat chickpeas dry with paper towel.
Toss with olive oil and spices.
Roast at 200°C for 25-30 minutes until crispy.
Cool and log final grams.
app_notes: Crunchy iron-rich plant-protein snack. Batch roast on Sunday for the week. Stays crispy for 3-4 days in an airtight container.

macro_adjustment_rules: Increase chickpeas by 40g to add ~4g protein and ~12g carbs.
Reduce olive oil to 3g to lower fat by ~2g.
Add nutritional yeast for cheesy flavour with extra B vitamins.

name: Guacamole & Veggie Sticks
instructions: Mash avocado with lime juice, onion, and diced tomato.
Season with salt and chilli if desired.
Serve with vegetable sticks.
Log final grams before eating.
app_notes: Folate-rich avocado snack perfect for follicular and ovulatory phases when oestrogen peaks.

macro_adjustment_rules: Add 20g more avocado for ~3g extra fat.
Add any non-starchy vegetables freely for minimal calorie impact.
Pair with 20g feta for ~4g extra protein.

name: Tuna on Cucumber Rounds
instructions: Drain tuna and mix with lemon juice and black pepper.
Slice cucumber into thick rounds.
Spoon tuna mixture onto each round.
Top with capers and log final grams.
app_notes: One of the most protein-dense snacks per calorie. Ideal for low-appetite days or when hitting protein targets is difficult.

macro_adjustment_rules: Add 30g more tuna to boost protein by ~7g.
Add 5g olive oil to introduce ~5g fat.
Serve on rice cakes instead of cucumber for ~16g more carbs.

name: Protein Energy Balls
instructions: Combine all ingredients in a bowl and mix well.
Roll into 3-4 balls and refrigerate 10 minutes.
Weigh finished balls for accurate logging.
Log final grams before eating.
app_notes: Batch-make on Sunday for the week. Each ball is approximately 90 kcal — easy to portion to remaining macros.

macro_adjustment_rules: Add 10g more protein powder to increase protein by ~8g.
Remove chocolate chips to reduce fat and carbs by ~3g each.
Swap honey for mashed banana to reduce sugar and add potassium.

name: Pear & Walnuts
instructions: Wash and slice pear.
Portion walnuts.
Serve together on a plate.
Log final grams before eating.
app_notes: Walnuts are one of the richest plant sources of ALA omega-3. Paired with fibre from pear, this is a calming luteal phase snack.

macro_adjustment_rules: Add 10g more walnuts for ~2g protein and ~6g fat.
Swap pear for apple to vary the fruit profile.
Add 30g Greek yogurt to introduce ~3g protein.

name: Nori Snack & Almonds
instructions: Portion nori, almonds, and edamame into a bowl.
Combine and mix.
Log final grams before eating.
Eat slowly — nori is very light and can be eaten quickly.
app_notes: Nori provides iodine for thyroid function which affects cycle regularity. Almonds add vitamin E for hormone balance.

macro_adjustment_rules: Add 10g more almonds for ~2g protein and ~5g fat.
Add 20g more edamame for ~3g protein and ~3g carbs.
Include sesame seeds for extra calcium.

name: Caprese Bites
instructions: Halve cherry tomatoes and slice mozzarella.
Alternate tomato and mozzarella on skewers or a plate.
Drizzle with olive oil and balsamic glaze.
Top with basil and log final grams.
app_notes: Calcium-rich snack supporting muscle function and reducing PMS symptoms. Light and elegant for low-appetite follicular days.

macro_adjustment_rules: Add 25g more mozzarella for ~6g protein and ~5g fat.
Remove olive oil to reduce fat by ~5g.
Add 20g prosciutto for ~4g more protein.

name: Popcorn with Nutritional Yeast
instructions: Pop popcorn and place in a large bowl.
Spray lightly with olive oil.
Sprinkle nutritional yeast and sea salt; toss to coat.
Log final grams before eating.
app_notes: Nutritional yeast provides B12 and B6, which are critical for serotonin synthesis and PMS mood management.

macro_adjustment_rules: Increase nutritional yeast by 5g to add ~4g protein.
Reduce popcorn portion to 25g to lower carbs by ~14g.
Add 10g dark chocolate chips for sweet/savoury combo.

name: Sliced Turkey & Mustard
instructions: Arrange turkey slices on a plate.
Serve with mustard for dipping.
Add cucumber slices on the side.
Log final grams before eating.
app_notes: Lowest-calorie high-protein snack in the database. Ideal for when protein targets need topping up with minimal calories.

macro_adjustment_rules: Add 30g more turkey for ~7g more protein with minimal calories.
Add a rice cake for ~8g carbs.
Add 20g avocado to introduce ~3g fat.

name: Sweet Potato & Tahini
instructions: Bake or microwave sweet potato until soft.
Mix tahini with lemon juice and garlic powder.
Slice or cube sweet potato and drizzle dressing.
Log final grams before eating.
app_notes: Beta-carotene from sweet potato and sesame in tahini support progesterone production in the luteal phase.

macro_adjustment_rules: Increase sweet potato by 50g to add ~12g more carbs.
Add 10g tahini for ~3g protein and ~8g fat.
Top with pomegranate seeds for antioxidant boost.

name: Mini Avocado Toast
instructions: Toast bread slice until golden.
Mash avocado with lemon juice and seasoning.
Spread avocado on toast.
Log final grams before eating.
app_notes: Mini version of the classic. Folate from avocado supports oestrogen metabolism during follicular and ovulatory phases.

macro_adjustment_rules: Add one poached egg for ~6g protein and ~5g fat.
Increase bread to full slice (90g) to double carbs.
Reduce avocado to 30g to lower fat by ~5g.

name: Kefir Gut Tonic
instructions: Pour kefir into a glass.
Stir in honey and cinnamon.
Drink slowly.
Log final grams before drinking.
app_notes: Kefir is one of the most potent probiotic sources. Gut health directly impacts oestrogen regulation via the estrobolome.

macro_adjustment_rules: Increase kefir by 100ml for ~7g more protein.
Remove honey to reduce carbs by ~7g.
Add mixed berries to increase antioxidants with minimal calories.

name: Pumpkin Seed & Raisin Mix
instructions: Measure each ingredient.
Combine in a small bag or bowl.
Log final grams before eating.
Note: weigh seeds carefully — they are dense.
app_notes: Pumpkin seeds are exceptionally high in zinc, magnesium, and iron — the three minerals most depleted during menstruation.

macro_adjustment_rules: Add 10g more pumpkin seeds for ~3g protein and ~5g fat.
Remove raisins to lower carbs by ~18g.
Swap chocolate chips for dried cherries for anti-inflammatory antioxidants.

name: Spiced Roasted Almonds
instructions: Toss almonds with oil spray and spices.
Roast at 180°C for 12-15 minutes until fragrant.
Cool completely before portioning.
Log final grams before eating.
app_notes: Almonds are the richest nut source of vitamin E, which is a key antioxidant supporting progesterone and oestrogen balance.

macro_adjustment_rules: Adjust almonds by 10g to change fat by ~6g and protein by ~3g.
Mix with pumpkin seeds for added zinc and magnesium.
Weigh precisely — fat content makes these very calorie-dense.

name: Frozen Banana Nice Cream
instructions: Freeze ripe banana slices for at least 4 hours.
Blend frozen banana with vanilla and cinnamon until smooth.
Serve immediately or re-freeze for firmer texture.
Log final grams before eating.
app_notes: Satisfies sweet cravings with zero added sugar and zero fat. Resistant starch in slightly unripe bananas feeds gut bacteria.

macro_adjustment_rules: Add 10g peanut butter to introduce ~4g protein and ~8g fat.
Add 10g protein powder for ~8g protein (blend well).
Top with berries for extra antioxidants.

name: Miso Soup with Silken Tofu
instructions: Heat water to just below boiling.
Dissolve miso paste — do not boil.
Add cubed silken tofu and rehydrated wakame.
Serve in a bowl, garnish with green onion, and log final grams.
app_notes: The lightest snack in the database. Miso is probiotic and warming — ideal for menstrual phase or low-appetite recovery days.

macro_adjustment_rules: Add 40g more tofu for ~5g more protein.
Add soba noodles (30g dry) to make this a light meal.
Include mushrooms for added umami and B vitamins.

name: Homemade Oat Energy Bar
instructions: Mix all ingredients until a thick dough forms.
Press into a bar shape or small pan.
Refrigerate 30 minutes until firm.
Weigh finished bar and log before eating.
app_notes: Make a batch of 6-8 bars on Sunday. Keeps refrigerated for 7 days. Great pre-workout or on-the-go option.

macro_adjustment_rules: Add 10g protein powder to boost protein by ~8g.
Remove dried cherries to reduce carbs by ~8g.
Swap honey for mashed banana to change texture and reduce sugar.

name: Smoked Mackerel Pâté on Rice Cakes
instructions: Flake mackerel and mix with cream cheese, lemon, and horseradish.
Spread pâté generously on rice cakes.
Garnish with watercress if available.
Log final grams before eating.
app_notes: Mackerel is one of the highest omega-3 oily fish. The pâté keeps refrigerated for 3 days — prep ahead for menstrual phase.

macro_adjustment_rules: Add 20g more mackerel for ~4g extra protein and fat.
Add a rice cake for ~8g carbs.
Swap cream cheese for Greek yogurt to lower fat by ~5g.

name: Pistachio & Date Bites
instructions: Pit dates and stuff each one with pistachios.
Arrange on a small plate.
Log exact grams before eating.
Eat mindfully — dates are very sweet and satisfying.
app_notes: Satisfies intense luteal sweet cravings with natural sugars. Pistachios are the most complete amino acid profile of any nut.

macro_adjustment_rules: Remove one date (~20g) to reduce carbs by ~16g.
Add 10g more pistachios for ~3g protein and ~5g fat.
Sprinkle with sea salt to amplify sweet–savoury balance.

name: Cottage Cheese Flaxseed Bowl
instructions: Spoon cottage cheese into a bowl.
Stir in flaxseed and cinnamon.
Top with mixed berries.
Log final grams before eating.
app_notes: Flaxseed contains lignans which support oestrogen metabolism across all cycle phases. High protein for a very low calorie count.

macro_adjustment_rules: Increase cottage cheese by 50g for ~8g more protein.
Add 5g honey to increase carbs by ~4g.
Increase flaxseed by 5g for ~2g more fat and fibre.
